description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% polyester, wide elasticated waistband with drawstrings, swoosh on the left leg, T90 appliquéd on the right leg, panel detailing above the hem on the sides and two zippered pockets on the sidesFitComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not dry clean, iron or bleachTumble dry lowBuilt with the breathable comfort and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, these nike football shorts come in a body-friendly design. These high-performance shorts with soft polyester fabric keeps you dry and comfortable. Team it with a T-shirt, tracksuit jacket and football shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of waist 32"
